HOME.SUBTITLE_1: I develop reliable web experiences, design secure network infrastructures
HOME.SUBTITLE_2: and manage complex systems — merging code and automation.

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Software & Network Engineer / Tech Specialist
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: I am a computer science student with a lifelong passion for technology. Over the years, I have learned a lot and am now capable of ranging from the design and administration of Systems and Networks, to the development of web architectures (MEAN stack, .NET), up to industrial automation (PLC, SCADA). In addition, I have a deep passion for Cybersecurity, which drives me to create increasingly secure and reliable solutions.
ABOUT.QUOTE: From lines of code to routing protocols, I tackle engineering challenges with a systemic, security-oriented vision.
